productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Black Fluid Trainer M Sports Shoes
description: Take training to the next level in these Fluid Trainer M shoes from adidas. Constructed for better comfort and cushioning, these shoes help you train longer and better. Team these with jeans and t-shirts for great urban style.UpperMeshed uppers with synthetic and Nu-overlays for durability and styleadidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides for styleLace ups for a snug and customised FitMeshed and padded tongue for enhanced breathable comfortFabric lining and padded heel collar MidsoleCushioned footbed provides all day comfortRubber midsole provides better shock absorption and cushioningOutsoleNon marking TPU outsole comprised of terraced lugs on the forefoot, heel and periphery of the foot for better gripOutsole extends and builds up to the sides, heel and forefoot to give better grip and protection on all sidesSlightly reinforced midfoot arch for better arch supportshoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
